title: sideritis clandestina subsp. cyllenea
intro: Sideritis clandestina subsp. cyllenea, also known as the Cretan mountain tea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis clandestina subsp. cyllenea include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Sideritis clandestina subsp. cyllenea can be consumed as a herbal tea, either on its own or in combination with other herbs, or in capsule or tincture form, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
